product: Dashboard theme settings and page enhancements
tagline: Dashboard import and export retains theme settings: When you import or export a dashboard as a file, theme settings are now preserved.
what_it_does: Dashboard import and export retains theme settings: When you import or export a dashboard as a file, theme settings are now preserved. To learn how to set a theme, see Theme settings. Dashboards now support up to 15 pages: The maximum number of pages per dashboard has increased from ten to fifteen.
why_it_matters: Annotation lines supported for temporal scales: You can now add annotation lines to charts with temporal scales.

capabilities.title: Include pages: Select which dashboard
capabilities.desc: Include pages: Select which dashboard pages to include as PDF attachments. Pages are attached in the selected order.

capabilities.title: Include data: Select widgets to
capabilities.desc: Include data: Select widgets to include as data attachments and choose an export format (CSV, TSV, or Excel).

key_takeaway: Dashboard import and export retains theme settings: When you import or export a dashboard as a file, theme settings are now preserved.
